/usr/bin/cc  -fsanitize=address -fsanitize=leak -fno-omit-frame-pointer -g -O1 -fsanitize=undefined -fno-sanitize-recover=undefined -fno-omit-frame-pointer -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -g  -fsanitize=address -fsanitize=leak -fsanitize=undefined CMakeFiles/integrated_demo.dir/integrated_learning_demo.c.o -o integrated_demo  -Wl,-rpath,/home/bbrelin/nimcp/bin: ../bin/libnimcp.so.2.6.2 -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.12.so -llz4 -ljansson /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsodium.so
